subject: Re: track motion shifts
body:
Hi Dimitry,
I was rather thinking of monitoring the motion of the first movies of a 
data collection to get the best alignment settings for each setup. Digital 
micrograph has this, but it is very tidious and of course uses other 
filters than Warp. 
It would be nice for example to know which frames move more and which move 
less... 
Best wishes,
Ottilie

On Wednesday, December 12, 2018 at 2:56:32 PM UTC+1, 
oloeff...@googlemail.com wrote:
>
> Hi,
> Is there a way to see the motion per frame in Warp somewhere? Could this 
> be added to the visualization?
> Ottilie
>
